steps.text: fry

recipes.title: Miso butter morning eggs
recipes.description: Silky custardy eggs whispering umami — the kind of breakfast you plate on ceramics and linger over.

steps.text: Whisk miso with a splash of warm water until smooth.
Melt butter in a non-stick pan over low heat; swirl in miso and soy sauce.
Crack in eggs and cook gently, tilting to set whites while keeping yolks silky.
Finish with scallions and sesame seeds. Serve immediately on warm rice.

recipes.title: Shoyu ramen with scallion oil
recipes.description: Clear shoyu broth, springy noodles, and a glossy scallion aroma oil on top.

steps.text: Simmer broth with soy sauce and mirin for 10 minutes; taste for balance.
Heat oil until just shimmering, pour over scallions in a heatproof bowl; cool.
Cook noodles per package; divide into bowls with hot broth.
Top with eggs, scallion oil, and extra scallions.

recipes.title: Gochugaru-glazed salmon
recipes.description: Honey-glossed heat, crisp edges, and a citrus finish for weeknight glamour.

steps.text: Whisk glaze ingredients until cohesive.
Pat salmon dry; sear skin-side down in an oiled skillet until crispy.
Flip briefly, reduce heat, spoon glaze repeatedly until lacquered.
Rest 3 minutes; finish with lime zest.

recipes.title: Yuzu panna cotta
recipes.description: Quietly luxurious: milk cream set, ribbons of citrus, barely sweet.

steps.text: Bloom gelatin in water for 5 minutes.
Warm cream, milk, sugar, and salt until steamy; off heat, whisk in gelatin.
Stir in yuzu juice; strain into ramekins; chill 4 hours.
Unmold or serve in glass; garnish with citrus supremes if desired.

recipes.title: Iced jasmine oolong latte
recipes.description: Floral lift, mellow tea tannin, and milk like silk over ice.

steps.text: Brew jasmine tea strong; chill completely.
Shake chilled tea with syrup until frothy.
Fill glasses with ice; pour tea three-quarters; float milk gently.
Stir before sipping; garnish with citrus oils if desired.

recipes.title: Charred eggplant rice bowl
recipes.description: Smoky-soft eggplant draped over warm rice with quick pickles.

steps.text: Broil eggplant until deeply charred and collapsed; scoop flesh.
Fold eggplant through warm glaze.
Pack rice in bowls; top with eggplant, pickles, halved egg.
Finish with togarashi and a drizzle of good-quality oil.
